package_registry.rollback: Set features.package_registry=false in settings. Registry, catalogue, and install routes stay dark; installed rows remain inert.

package_themes.rollback: Set features.package_themes=false. Theme routes stay dark and the system theme serves; safe mode remains flag-independent.

capabilities.rollback: Set features.capabilities=false. Resolver and role routes stay dark; authorization falls back to legacy users.role, board_moderators, and post_min_role authority.

passkeys.rollback: Set features.passkeys=false. WebAuthn ceremonies stop; credential rows are preserved for later recovery; password/OAuth/TOTP/recovery sign-in paths remain available.

provider_registry.rollback: Set features.provider_registry=false. Registry-driven providers disable; built-in Google/Apple/GitHub continue on the accepted fixed-provider path.

invitations.rollback: Set features.invitations=false. Issuance and redemption pause; token hashes and audit rows are preserved for investigation and expiry.

service_secrets.rollback: Set features.service_secrets=false. New secrets refuse; reveal/revoke/prune remain available so dependent consumers can be decommissioned safely.

api_tokens.rollback: Set features.api_tokens=false. /api/v1 authenticates nothing; tokens stay revocable through the admin surface.

webhooks.rollback: Set features.webhooks=false. Dispatch no-ops and the worker drains nothing new; endpoint config and delivery ledger are preserved.

first_party_hooks.rollback: Set features.first_party_hooks=false. Domain producers no-op; no queued state exists to reconcile.

server_extensions.rollback: Reserved dark for Gate B. No behavior exists until the sandbox runtime passes adversarial acceptance.

governance.rollback: Reserved dark for Gate B. No behavior exists until groups, approvals, and access review land after Gate A.

service_principals.rollback: Reserved dark for Gate B. No behavior exists until remote-app identities land after Gate A.

verified_links.rollback: Reserved dark for Gate B. No behavior exists until verified profile links land after Gate A.
